title: Rhythm Nation
meaning_summary: Its message, rhythm, and visual legacy give the song unusual long-tail value in both cultural memory and streaming.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming remains the main recurring source.
Strong cultural recognition supports sustained replay.
Documentary and media reuse help keep the track commercially visible.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Rhythm Nation is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
